waivers.reason: Golden path monitor is intentionally disabled in CI lanes that set SKIP_GOLDEN_PATH=true to avoid false negatives on ephemeral preview environments.
OAuth redirect integration requires live provider callbacks and test credentials that are not available in default CI.
Session-expiry scenario needs deterministic token-expiry injection support in auth test harness.
HTTPS enforcement check is production-only and cannot be validated in localhost-only Playwright execution.
Workflow smoke depends on optional UI entry points that vary by feature-flag state in test tenants.
Start workflow control is conditionally rendered; scenario remains waived pending deterministic fixture setup.
New-case trigger depends on seeded sidebar state that is not guaranteed in shared CI environments.
Upload Notes starter card can be hidden by tenant feature toggles in smoke environments.
CRM import starter visibility depends on integration enablement in tenant-level settings.
Case selection smoke requires pre-existing cases; some clean tenants intentionally start empty.
Ask AI action is hidden when assistant features are disabled for the test tenant.
SDUI render indicators are environment-dependent and currently lack a deterministic fixture-backed assertion path.
